greeting: Hey there! Welcome to Barkin' Creek Dog Kitchen & Bath. I'm the virtual receptionist. How can I help you and your pup today? 🐾

faq.a: Yes! Call us at (512) 982-6700 or visit our website to schedule.

faq.q: How long does a full groom take?
faq.a: Most full grooming sessions take 1.5-2 hours depending on your dog's breed and coat.
We specialize in dog grooming. Please reach out to a cat-specific groomer for your feline friend.
We're in Austin, Texas. Call us for the exact location and directions.

faq.q: What breeds do you work with?
faq.a: We groom dogs of all breeds and sizes — from tiny poodles to massive double-coated breeds.
Absolutely. We use gentle techniques to make sure your pup feels safe and comfortable.

escalation: Great question! Let me have a team member get back to you. Call us at (512) 982-6700.
